name: helloloop
description: Backlog-driven continuous repository execution for Codex with verification loops and explicit skill and CLI entrypoints.

interface.shortDescription: Continuous repo execution with backlog and Ralph Loop guards
interface.longDescription: HelloLoop packages backlog-driven continuous development for Codex as an official plugin bundle with explicit skill and CLI entrypoints.
defaultPrompt: Use HelloLoop to inspect backlog state and keep this repo moving with explicit run-loop commands.
